cards.name: Defend
cards.text: Gain 5 Block.

cards.name: Extract Essence
cards.text: Deal 10 damage. On unblocked damage, create a Potion.
cards.note: ExtractEssence: deal damage; on unblocked damage, create a random potion from a HARD-CODED loot table (Herbal Brew pattern — not a live catalog query), so the pool is tuned per card.

cards.name: Strike
cards.text: Deal 6 damage.
cards.note: The only difference between the starting Strike cards are portrait, attack vfx, and color.

cards.name: Bag of Teeth
cards.text: Deal 2 damage 4 times.

cards.name: Bewitching Grin
cards.text: Gain 5 Block. Apply 2 Weak to ALL enemies.
cards.note: Bewitching Grin: a cheap one-shot skill — block up while sapping every enemy with Weak.

cards.name: Big Batch
cards.text: Create {Brews:diff()} Noxious Brews.
cards.note: Big Batch: one cauldron, many bottles — create a batch of Noxious Brews.

cards.name: Broom Strike
cards.text: Deal 6 damage. Your next Skill costs 1 less.
cards.note: Broom Strike: swat with the broom; the follow-through sweeps your next Skill in cheaper.

cards.name: Call the Pack
cards.text: Gain 6 Block. Shuffle 2 Gnash into your Draw Pile.
cards.note: Call the Pack: hunker down behind the wolves — gain Block, shuffle Gnash tokens into the Draw Pile.

cards.name: Fertilize
cards.text: Gain 5 Brambles. Next turn, gain {EnergyNextTurnPower:energyIcons()}.
cards.note: Fertilize: sow now, reap next turn — gain Brambles and bank 1 Energy for next turn (base-game <see cref="EnergyNextTurnPower" />).

cards.name: Forbidden Magic
cards.text: Deal 15 damage. Gain 2 Weak.

cards.name: Herbal Brew
cards.text: Create a utility Potion.
cards.note: Shared base for the "brew a potion of orientation X" trio (Wicked / Stony / Herbal Brew).

cards.name: Hide in a Bush
cards.text: Gain 7 Block. Gain 3 Brambles.
cards.note: Hide in a Bush (formerly Spines): Block plus Brambles.

cards.name: Lavender and Sage
cards.text: Draw 2 cards. Gain 3 Brambles.
cards.note: Lavender and Sage: draw a card and grow a thicket of Brambles.

cards.name: Needle Whip
cards.text: Deal 9 damage. Gain 3 Brambles.
cards.note: Needle Whip: lash out with a thorned vine — damage plus Brambles.

cards.name: Pact of Agony
cards.text: Deal 12 damage to ALL enemies. Add 1 Wound to your Discard Pile.
cards.note: Pact of Agony: clog your deck with Wounds for a heavy strike on every enemy.

cards.name: Pocket Rats
cards.text: Deal 5 damage. Add 2 Rats into your Hand.
cards.note: Pocket Rats: dump a handful of one-shot Rats straight into your hand.

cards.name: Read the Bones
cards.text: Apply 2 Hex. Next turn, gain 6 Block.
cards.note: Read the Bones: curse the enemy now, foresee the blow to come — apply Hex, then gain Block next turn (base-game <see cref="BlockNextTurnPower" />).

cards.name: Stony Brew
cards.text: Create a defensive Potion.
cards.note: Shared base for the "brew a potion of orientation X" trio (Wicked / Stony / Herbal Brew).

cards.name: Tinder
cards.text: Lose 1 Brambles. Gain 2.
cards.note: Tinder: burn a bramble as kindling for Energy.

cards.name: Trash Diving
cards.text: Put a card from your Discard Pile into your Hand. Add a Rats into your Hand.
cards.note: Trash Diving: dig one card back out of the discard pile (Rummage/base-game Dredge pattern) and a Rats scurries out with it — one Rats is generated straight into your hand.

cards.name: Vexing Strike
cards.text: Deal 8 damage. Apply 1 Hex.
cards.note: Vexing Strike (was Vexing Thwack): an Attack that also seeds the target with Hex.

cards.name: Weathered Witch Hat
cards.text: Gain 10 Block. Play a random Skill from your Draw Pile.
cards.note: Weathered Witch Hat: Block, then play a random Skill from your draw pile (free auto-play; nothing happens if the pile holds none).

cards.name: Wicked Brew
cards.text: Create an offensive Potion.
cards.note: Shared base for the "brew a potion of orientation X" trio (Wicked / Stony / Herbal Brew).

cards.name: Bear Familiar
cards.text: Summon a Bear Familiar.

cards.name: Bind in Blood
cards.text: Lose 2 HP. Apply 3 Hex.
cards.note: Bind in Blood: pay your own blood to seed the target with Hex.

cards.name: Bottle Barrage
cards.text: Deal 7 damage for each Potion created this combat.{InCombat: (Hits {CalculatedHits:diff()} times)|}
cards.note: Hurl the whole belt: one 10-damage hit per potion you've brewed this combat.

cards.name: Cat Familiar
cards.text: Summon a Cat Familiar.
cards.note: Summons a cosmetic cat pet alongside the familiar power.

cards.name: Circle of Rot
cards.text: You and your allies gain 20 Block and 2 Weak. Apply 2 Weak to ALL enemies.
cards.note: Multiplayer-only. Co-op rot ritual (MP-only): you and every ally hunker down (Block) but soak up the rot (Weak), while all enemies choke on it too.

cards.name: Cloak of Moonlight
cards.text: Whenever you create a card or Potion, gain 2 Block.

cards.name: Command
cards.text: Deal 3 damage. One of your Familiars creates a card.
cards.note: Command (was Throw Bait): a quick strike and an order barked at the pack — one random familiar does its card production once (a single roll, regardless of stacks).

cards.name: Creeping Vines
cards.text: Gain 7 Brambles X times.
cards.note: Spend X energy to pile Brambles on yourself, 7 at a time, X times — a fast way to stack a big Bramble count.

cards.name: Deep Roots
cards.text: At the start of your turn, gain 4 Brambles.
cards.note: Deep Roots: a Power that grows Brambles at the start of every turn.

cards.name: Eye of Newt
cards.text: Your Potions deal double damage.
cards.note: Eye of Newt (was Experiment): a Power that makes your potions hit harder.

cards.name: Grind Down
cards.text: Exhaust a card. Create a Potion.
cards.note: Grind Down: Exhaust a card from your hand and grind it into a potion.

cards.name: Hasty Brew
cards.text: Create an Energy Potion.
cards.note: Hasty Brew: fast mana — brew an Energy Potion.

cards.name: Hidden in Smoke
cards.text: At the start of your turn, create a Vial of Smoke.
cards.note: Hidden in Smoke: a Power that brews a Vial of Smoke at the start of every turn.

cards.name: Light the Candle
cards.text: Create a Vial of Smoke. Upgrade 2 cards in your Hand.
cards.note: Light the Candle: upgrade random cards in your hand (via <c>CardCmd.Upgrade</c> so any on-upgrade listeners fire), then create a Vial of Smoke.

cards.name: Moonbeam
cards.text: Deal 8 damage. Deal {BeamDamage:diff()} damage at the start of each of your turns.
cards.note: Moonbeam: strike, then leave the beam on the target — it takes the same damage again at the start of each of your turns (<see cref="MoonbeamPower" />, stacks on repeat plays).

cards.name: Overrun
cards.text: Deal 5 damage. Whenever you play a Familiar card this turn, deal 5 additional damage.
cards.note: Overrun: mark one enemy for the pack — every Familiar card played this turn tramples it again.

cards.name: Owl Familiar
cards.text: Summon an Owl Familiar.
cards.note: Summons a cosmetic owl pet alongside the familiar power.

cards.name: Pact of Fury
cards.text: Gain 5 Weak. Other allies gain 4 Strength.
cards.note: Multiplayer-only. Co-op (MP-only): take 5 Weak onto yourself so every other ally gains Strength.

cards.name: Pick Clean
cards.text: Deal 7 damage. Draw a card for each of your Familiars.

cards.name: Prices Paid
cards.text: Lose X HP. Deal 6 damage. Create X Noxious Brews.
cards.note: Prices Paid: bleed yourself for a strike, then brew the spilled blood into a Noxious Brew.

cards.name: Refuse Pile
cards.text: Gain 12 Block. Add 2 Rats into your Draw Pile and Discard Pile.
cards.note: Refuse Pile: block up and seed your piles with Rats — two into the draw pile, two into the discard.

cards.name: Ritual Sacrifice
cards.text: Sacrifice a Familiar. Draw 3 cards. Apply 5 Hex.
cards.note: Only gains Block if a Familiar was actually sacrificed.

cards.name: Rot Bloom
cards.text: Deal 10 damage. Duplicate ALL debuffs.
cards.note: Rot Bloom: heavy hit, then every debuff on the target blooms — each debuff power's stacks are duplicated (applied again at its current amount, Rend's debuff filter: temporary powers excluded).

cards.name: Rotting Roots
cards.text: At the start of your turn, ALL enemies lose 3 HP and gain 1 Hex.
cards.note: Rotting Roots: a slow rot — every turn all enemies wither and grow hexed.

cards.name: Salt and Ash
cards.text: Gain 8 Block. Gain {BonusBlock:diff()} extra Block if you have a debuff.
cards.note: Salt and Ash: Block, plus bonus Block if you're carrying a debuff.

cards.name: Share the Brew
cards.text: You and your allies each gain a random Potion.
cards.note: Multiplayer-only. Co-op (MP-only): pass a round of brews — you and every ally each gain a random potion.

cards.name: Sprouts
cards.text: Gain 3 Block. Gain 3 Brambles. Add a Sprouts into your Discard Pile.
cards.note: Sprouts: a small guard that reseeds itself — block + Brambles, and a copy of this card sprouts in your Discard pile (Anger pattern).

cards.name: Strike Fear
cards.text: Deal 9 damage. Apply 1 Vulnerable.
cards.note: Strike Fear: a jab that leaves the target flinching — damage plus Vulnerable.

cards.name: Stuck in a Bush
cards.text: Gain 6 Brambles. Gain 1 Vulnerable.

cards.name: Taste of Blood
cards.text: Deal 9 damage. Draw 2 cards. Costs 1 less {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} for each Attack played this turn.
cards.note: Taste of Blood: one savage bite that comes easier the more blood is already spilled — costs 1 less for each Attack played this turn (base-game Stomp discount shape).

cards.name: Toil and Trouble
cards.text: Deal 5 damage twice. Give a random card in your Draw Pile Replay {Replay}.
cards.note: "Double, double, toil and trouble" — hit twice, then enchant a random card in your Draw Pile with Replay.

cards.name: Torment
cards.text: Deal 12 damage. This turn, whenever you play a Potion, apply 1 Hex to a random enemy.
cards.note: Marker for attacks that don't burn the target's Hex — <see cref="HexPower" /> skips its after-attack stack loss when the attacking card implements this.

cards.name: Volatile Vapors
cards.text: Whenever you use or create a Potion, deal 6 damage to a random enemy.
cards.note: Volatile Vapors: every brew fumes — using or creating a potion vents damage at a random enemy.

cards.name: Wax and Wane
cards.text: Gain 8 Block. At the start of your next turn, apply 1 Hex to ALL enemies.
cards.note: Wax and Wane: shore up with Block now; the curse lands at the start of next turn, on everyone.

cards.name: Wild Growth
cards.text: Double your Brambles.
cards.note: Exhausts (until upgraded).

cards.name: Wolf Familiar
cards.text: Summon a Wolf Familiar.

cards.name: A Little Sip
cards.text: Whenever you use a Potion, heal 1 HP and gain 1 Strength.
cards.note: A Little Sip: a Power that heals 1 HP whenever you use a potion.

cards.name: Ambush!
cards.text: Deal 10 damage to ALL enemies. Whenever you draw this card, play it for free.
cards.note: Ambush!: AoE strike that springs itself — auto-plays for free when drawn.

cards.name: Bonfire
cards.text: Gain 4. Exhaust 2 cards from your Hand.
cards.note: Bonfire: feed the flames — a burst of Energy, paid for by exhausting two cards.

cards.name: Bottle Wall
cards.text: Gain 8 Block. Create a Fortifier Potion.
cards.note: Bottle Wall: gain Block and brew up a Fortifier potion.

cards.name: Bottomless Cauldron
cards.text: Whenever you use a Potion, create a Noxious Brew.

cards.name: Brambleburst
cards.text: Deal {CalculatedDamage:diff()} damage. Deals 1 additional damage for each of your Brambles.
cards.note: Hits once per Bramble; does nothing if you have no Brambles.

cards.name: Broken Pact
cards.text: Sacrifice a random Familiar. Gain 8 Strength.
cards.note: Broken Pact: end a familiar's service and take its strength for your own.

cards.name: Capture Soul
cards.text: Deal 5 damage. Apply {CalculatedHex:diff()} Hex. If Fatal, Permanently increase this card's hex by 1.
cards.note: Capture Soul: each kill is bottled forever — this copy permanently applies +1 Hex per enemy it has killed, across combats and save/load (<c>[SavedProperty]</c> + DeckVersion propagation, the base-game GeneticAlgorithm pattern).

cards.name: Cauldron Dance
cards.text: Whenever you play a Skill this turn, draw a card.

cards.name: Crow Familiar
cards.text: Summon a Crow Familiar.

cards.name: Crystal Bottle
cards.text: The next Potion you use is used again at the start of each turn.
cards.note: Crystal Bottle: a Power — the next potion you use becomes a Buff that repeats its effect each turn.

cards.name: Cursed Spellbook
cards.text: Gain 3. Draw 2 cards. Gain 3 Hex.
cards.note: Cursed Spellbook: a free surge of power with the curse baked in — Energy and cards now, Hex to pay for it.

cards.name: Distill
cards.text: Transform a random Potion into a Rare Potion.
cards.note: Distill (renamed from Brew): replace a random belt potion (non-Rares prioritized) with a random RARE non-healing potion of the same orientation (see <see cref="PotionUpgrade" />).

cards.name: Embrace the Wilds
cards.text: Summon {Familiars:diff()} random Familiars. Draw {DrawReduction} fewer cards at the start of each turn.
cards.note: Embrace the Wilds: summon a burst of random familiars at the cost of drawing fewer cards each turn for the rest of combat.

cards.name: Extract Life
cards.text: Deal 12 damage. Give a card in your hand Replay {Replay:diff()} and Exhaust.
cards.note: Extract Life: an Attack that also enchants a chosen card in your hand with Replay and Exhaust — one big extra payoff this combat, then gone.

cards.name: Gather Herbs
cards.text: Copy the next 1 Potion you create.
cards.note: Copy the next potion you create this combat.

cards.name: Hexblast
cards.text: Deal 8 damage twice to ALL enemies. Apply 2 Hex to ALL enemies.
cards.note: Hexblast: blast every enemy, then lay Hex on all of them.

cards.name: Message in a Bottle
cards.text: Bottle a card in your Hand into a Potion.
cards.note: Message in a Bottle: bottle a chosen card from your hand into a Bottled Message potion; using the potion returns the card to your hand.

cards.name: Mulch
cards.text: Exhaust your Discard Pile. Gain 1 Brambles and 1 Block for each card Exhausted.{InCombat: ({CalculatedBrambles:diff()} Damage, {CalculatedBlock:diff()} Block)|}
cards.note: Mulch: compost the whole discard pile — EXHAUST it for Brambles and Block per card.

cards.name: Plaguestorm
cards.text: Apply 2 Hex to ALL enemies. Deal 5 damage to a random enemy for each Rats played this combat.{InCombat: (Hits {CalculatedHits:diff()} times)|}
cards.note: Plaguestorm (was Plague): hex the whole board, then the storm strikes — one hit against a random enemy for each Rats card played this combat.

cards.name: Polymorph
cards.text: Transform a card in your Draw Pile into 2 Rats.
cards.note: Polymorph (was Repurpose): choose a card in your draw pile — it becomes a Rats token.

cards.name: Rat Familiar
cards.text: Summon a Rat Familiar.
cards.note: Exhausts.

cards.name: Rattling Bottles
cards.text: Deal 15 damage. Fill your empty potion slots with Rocks.
cards.note: Rattling Bottles: an attack that also crams every empty potion slot full of rocks.

cards.name: Ritual Casting
cards.text: Whenever you play a Skill that costs 2 or more, a random card in your Hand is free to play this turn.
cards.note: Ritual Casting: a Power — big Skills each unlock a random free card this turn.

cards.name: Wicker Form
cards.text: Whenever you play a card, gain 2 Brambles.
cards.note: Wicker Form: become the wicker — every card you play sprouts Brambles.

cards.name: Witchcraft
cards.text: Create X random Potions.
cards.note: Witchcraft: spend X Energy, create X random potions.

cards.name: Dark Omen
cards.text: Apply 1 Hex.
cards.note: Crow familiar token (formerly Claw Eyes): an ill portent — Hex a single target.

cards.name: Ferocity
cards.text: Deal 7 damage for each Attack played this turn.{InCombat: (Hits {CalculatedHits:diff()} times)|}
cards.note: Cat familiar token: one 7-damage hit per Attack you played this turn, INCLUDING itself (always ≥1).

cards.name: Gnash
cards.text: Deal {CalculatedDamage:diff()} damage. Increase the damage of ALL Gnash cards by 3 this combat.
cards.note: Wolf familiar token.

cards.name: Hibernate
cards.text: Gain 15 Block. Next turn, gain 10 Vigor.
cards.note: Bear familiar token: den up — block now, wake up swinging with Vigor next turn.

cards.name: Knowledge
cards.text: Copy a random non-Knowledge card in your Hand.
cards.note: Owl familiar token: memorize a card — copy a card in your hand (base-game Dual Wield pattern: <c>CreateClone</c>, added through the generated-card funnel so creation payoffs fire).

cards.name: Mutilate
cards.text: Deal 20 damage. Ignores Block.
cards.note: Bear familiar token: heavy hit that ignores Block.

cards.name: Nimble
cards.text: Gain 1. Gain 5 Block.
cards.note: Cat familiar token: feline agility bottled as tempo — gain Energy and Block.

cards.name: Rats
cards.text: Deal 3 damage. Draw 1 card.
cards.note: Rat familiar token (was Scavengers): tiny attack that cycles.

cards.name: Rummage
cards.text: Put 1 card from your Discard Pile into your Hand.
cards.note: Rat familiar token: dig a card back out of the discard pile (base-game Dredge pattern).

cards.name: Shiny!
cards.text: Put a card from your Draw Pile into your Hand.
cards.note: Crow familiar token: pluck a shiny — fetch a chosen card from the Draw Pile.

cards.name: Swarm
cards.text: Shuffle 2 Rats into your Draw Pile.
cards.note: Rat familiar token: flood the deck — shuffle Rats into the draw pile (Call the Pack pattern).

cards.name: Wisdom
cards.text: Draw 1 card, then discard a card.
cards.note: Owl familiar token.

cards.name: Catalyst
cards.text: Whenever you use a Potion, duplicate a random card in your Hand.
cards.note: Catalyst: the Witch's unique Ancient card (granted by Dusty Tome — any <c>CardRarity.Ancient</c> card in the pool outside the transcendence map qualifies).

cards.name: Rip Soul
cards.text: Deal 15 damage. Apply 3 Hex. Create a Rare Potion.
cards.note: Rip Soul: the Ancient (transcended) form of Extract Essence — tear the soul out of an enemy: heavy damage, 3 Hex, and ONE potent potion from a hard-coded loot table (Extract Essence pattern).

cards.name: Wormy
cards.text: Lose 1 HP.
cards.note: Wormy: a playable nuisance status (from Wormy Apple).
